deleteWorkspaceWarning: Once you delete a workspace, there is no going back. All data and resources associated with this workspace will be permanently removed.
deleteWorkspaceConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete workspace {name}?
thisActionCannotBeUndone: This action cannot be undone. All data and associated resources will be permanently removed.
youDoNotHavePermissionToDeleteThisWorksp: You do not have permission to delete this workspace
cannotDeleteWorkspacePleaseRemoveAllData: Cannot delete workspace. Please remove all databases first. Found {count} database(s).
youDontHavePermissionToModifyTheseSettin: You don't have permission to modify these settings
removeMemberConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove "{email}" from this workspace?
pleaseSelectAMemberToTransferOwnershipTo: Please select a member to transfer ownership to
noAuditLogsFoundForThisWorkspace: No audit logs found for this workspace.
failedToLoadWorkspaceAuditLogs: Failed to load workspace audit logs
youDontHavePermissionToCreateWorkspaces: You don't have permission to create workspaces. Please ask administrator to create workspace for you.
workspaceDescription:
Workspace is a place where you group:
- your databases;
- storages (like local drive, S3, Google Drive, etc.)
- notifiers (like email, Slack, Telegram, etc.);
- access control (if you have team);
transferOwnershipWarning: This action cannot be undone. You will lose ownership of this workspace and the new owner will have full control.
